segments.text: Dodges back and lands down smash!
segments.original_text: 後ろをかわして下スマッシュ

segments.text: Barely escapes with a left dodge
segments.original_text: 左回避なんとか逃れて

segments.text: Catches Wario in the upper corner!
segments.original_text: ワリオの上端隅に刺さる
ボットリングを捨ててバイクがない

full_text: Dodges back and lands down smash! Goes in aggressive, but barely escapes with a left dodge. Charges Megavolt! Catches Wario in the upper corner! The bike is gone!

corrections.rule: move name (シャツ→下スマッシュ)

corrections.corrected: 左回避なんとか逃れて

corrections.original: マリオの商談用スミに刺さる
corrections.corrected: ワリオの上端隅に刺さる
corrections.rule: character name (マリオ→ワリオ) + misheard
